rationale: Educ. Code §45.162 governs investment of bond proceeds by an authority. It is unrelated to residence homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b); no conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 45.162. INVESTMENT OF BOND PROCEEDS. In addition to other powers, an authority may invest the proceeds of its bonds, until that money is needed, in the direct obligations of or obligations unconditionally guaranteed by the United States, to the extent authorized in the bond resolution or trust indenture or in both.
_note: Rule text concerns bond proceeds investment only; no reference to homestead exemptions or property tax appraisal.
